verses.text: Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmlekhat kum, tua kha a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi mite awngin hih bangin kiko uh hi. Amaute in, ‘Sumbawlna lama i kidempih Jerusalem khuapi zancip gawp hi. A kulhpite tu-in kihongkek a, amaute' guallelhna tu-in eima hauhna suak ding hi,’ ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka genin-ah: Taia khuapi aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi hi. Nangmah a sim dingin minam tampi kong paipih ding a, tuipi hualte bangin hong kuan henhan ding uh hi
Na kulhpite susia-in, na tausangte supai ding uh hi. Tua ciangin leitang khempeuh kiatkhia-in a suangtumte bek omlai ding hi
Nidangin tuipi in a tup ngei suangte tungah tu-in ngasa bengte in a ngen uh pho ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin hi. Minam dangte in nang Taia khuapi hong luhgawp ding uh a
na gamsunga khuapi dangte sungah a teng mi khempeuh, a namsau uh tawh that khin ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nang Taia khuapi in na hong thei ding hi, ci hi

“Tua ciangin kumpi khempeuh lak panin a lianpen ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar, nang Taia khuapi a sim dingin kong paipih ding hi. Amah leilu lam gam pan hong kipanin galkap honpi, sakolte leh a leengte, leh sakol galkap honte hong tonpih ding hi
Gamsunga om khuapi-a teng mi khempeuh galkidona sungah si ding uh hi. Note hong simna dingun galte in dum to-in, phung ciangin, a kidalna dingun kulh muan'huai bawl ding uh hi
Amaute in molhtum tawh na kulhpite satkham ding uh a, na tausangte uh zong hei tawh phukgawp ding uh hi
A sakolte uh a paina leivui khute in khuapi tuamcip ding hi. Van pua leeng leh leeng galkapte' gin'na in khuapi kulhte cimsak ding a, a kisusiasa kulhkongpi-a pai bangin hong lut lel ding uh hi
Sakol galkapte in kongzing khempeuh tuancilgawp ding uh a, a namsau uh tawh mi khempeuh vatlum ding uh hi. Innkhuam lianpipite leilak kiden'na ding hi

Note' neihsa na hoih khempeuh, na galte un a ututin zang ding uh hi. Kulhte supai-in inn hoihpipite satthanggawp ding uh hi. Inn-a kizang sing leh suang, leh na khempeuh la-in tuipi sung den'na ding uh hi
Khuapi sungah lasakna awging ka beisak ding a, tumtheih awgingte khempeuh zong kiza nawnlo ding hi

Khuapi sungah bangmah om nawnloin, ngasa bengte in a ngen uh a pho theihna ding suangtumte bek ka omsak lai ding hi. Nang Taia khuapi hong kilamkik nawnlo ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khinta hi,” a hong ci hi
Topa Pasian in Taia khuapi tungah hih bangin thu gen hi: “Nang hong kisimin hong kilak ni ciangin na sunga kithat mite' kut vengvangna in tuipi dunga teng mite lau-in patausak ding hi

Tuipi a zang minamte' kumpite, a kumpi tokhom tung uh panin kumkhia ding uh a, a kumpi puante uh leh a puan hoih silhte uh suahkhia-in, leilakah tu-in, lau-in a ling ding uh hi. Nangma thuakna hong muh manun lau mahmah ding uh a, a ci-lin' uh pha theilo ding hi

Tua ciangin nang tawh kisai-in hih bangin dah la hong phuah ding uh hi: A minthang khuapi kisia ta a, a teembawte tuipi panin maimangta hi. Hih khuapi mite in tuipi uk ngei uh a, tuipi gei-ah a teng mi khempeuh' kihtak hi ngei hi
Tu-in hih khuapi kia ta a, tuikulh khempeuh lau-in ling uh hi. Tua bang siatna hangin tuikulhah a teng mite, lau-in lamdang a sa uh hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Kuamah a ten'lohna a kisia khuapi bangin a gamkhing khuapi-in kong bawl ding hi. Tuipi tuite kong tumsak ding hi

Tanglai-a a sisa mite tawh a tengkhawm dingin misite' khua Leinuai-ah kong puak ding hi. Siatna a thuak tawntung leinuai-a omte lakah kong koih ding a, a sisate tawh na om ding hi. A hingte lakah a omkik dingin tua lai panin nong kilehkik nawn kei ding hi

Nang pen mite' etteh dingin a lauhuai mahmahin kong bawl ding a, tua pen nang-a' dingin a beina hita ding hi. Mite in nang hong zon'zon' hangun hong muzo nawnlo ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi.
